expectations.text: Reads the full plan before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Read .prism/shared/plans/2026-03-01-three-package-split.md — the full plan (lines 1-100, 477-560, plus grep results across entire file)'

expectations.text: Presents a structured 'Iteration Needed' block with Trigger, Current State, Changes Required, and Impact
expectations.evidence: Step 2 presents structured block with all four sections: Trigger, Current State, Changes Required, and Impact.

expectations.text: Adds an Iteration Log entry to the plan with date, reason, and specific changes
expectations.evidence: Step 3 Change 3 adds an Iteration Log with date '2026-03-08 - Iteration 1', Reason, and Changes list.

expectations.text: Does NOT delete existing plan content — uses strikethrough or annotations to preserve history
expectations.evidence: Step 3 only adds content (new Iteration Log entry) and unchecks a verification. No deletion of existing plan content. Change 1 replaces an import path but doesn't delete content.

expectations.text: Gets user approval before resuming implementation
expectations.evidence: Summary: 'Status: Awaiting user approval of plan changes before implementation'. Iteration Log: 'Approved by: Pending user approval'.

expectations.text: Resumes from the affected phase, not from the beginning
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'implementation would resume at Phase 5' — not from Phase 1.
